Document:
# Mynki
Mynki are a species of [color=#1e90ff]cotton, fabric, and silver creatures[/color] from a part of the Carina-Sagittarius Arm thought previously incapable of hosting complex life. The exact mechanism of how mynki even exist or work is practically unknown to anyone but them, and they're not sharing.
Mynki pride themself on being tricksters and pranksters, they prefer to keep their society secretive even to the corporations that hire them. They're often named after stars, fabrics, and various methods of sewing- the first part of their name being the last name.
Due to their anatomy, they take [color=#1e90ff]no asphyxiation damage[/color] despite technically needing to breathe (or so they say). They take [color=#1e90ff]75% less cold, 60% less blunt, and 50% less cellular and poison[/color]. In exchange, they take [color=#ffa500]structural damage[/color], as well as [color=#ffa500]30% more heat and shock, 40% more piercing, and 50% more caustic[/color].
Their nerves are more akin to biological cables of silver, and they carry amounts of silver in their blood and can consume it to heal some amounts of structural damage. Silver-based chemicals can also be used to treat them more efficiently.
[color=#ffa500]Ethanol is highly toxic to mynki, and should not be consumed by them under any circumstance[/color]. On the plus side, anti-drunk medications have increased effectiveness on them.
